reasoning: There is no ongoing outbreak positioned to be declared a pandemic by December 31, 2025. The World Health Organization has historically reserved the 'pandemic' label for events like COVID-19 and H1N1 where there is sustained, rapid human-to-human spread globally across multiple WHO regions. Mpox was declared a Public Health Emergency of International Concern (PHEIC) but explicitly not a pandemic, and H5N1 avian flu has not shown human-to-human transmission. With only 5 weeks remaining in 2025, any new disease would not have time to spread globally and reach the stringent threshold for a pandemic declaration. The Polymarket price was 3% as early as mid-November, corroborating a very low likelihood. I am predicting 2% (the minimum allowed value), as the probability is functionally near zero.
